videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 2.1 — What is Vector Search
videos.description:
Keyword search vs vector search: matching by meaning instead of exact words, and why it matters for RAG.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/02-vector-search/lessons/01-intro.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 2 — Vector Search.
